channel.title: web-dev on Ray's website
channel.description: Recent content in web-dev on Ray's website

item.title: My Portfolio Website
item.description: I designed my portfolio website using Hugo and published the site on GitHub Pages. This website was created using the Hugo theme called Developer Portfolio. It also uses the UIKit framework inside, however I did not change any settings myself. It was created primarily for the purpose of recording the following information: An overview of my personal background and skills A dedicated page with my contact information A portfolio showcasing my work A blog Here is the link to My Portfolio Website.

item.title: My Contact Information Website
item.description: I designed my portfolio website using Hugo and published the site on GitHub Pages. This website was created using the Hugo theme called Lynx. The process of building up the website so that it could be published on GitHub Pages was difficult because of an error, but I was happy to finally resolve it. I wanted a website where I could post all of my contact information for Twitter, Instagram, websites, etc.
